review_notes: The functions are generally well-named and map correctly to Kubernetes security controls relevant to PCI DSS 2.2.7, which focuses on restricting public access. However, minor improvements in naming consistency and clarity could be considered.
naming_improvements: Consider using 'k8s_service_nodeport_disabled' instead of 'k8s_service_type_not_nodeport' for consistency with naming patterns that emphasize the action being checked.
title: Requirement 2.2.7
step1_reasoning: The control 2.2.7 focuses on ensuring that resources are not publicly accessible unless necessary. In Kubernetes, this can be achieved by implementing NetworkPolicies to deny ingress and egress by default, ensuring that services are not exposed via NodePort, and enforcing TLS on Ingress resources to secure communication.
